# Laravel

Imperial Arms is a Star Citizen organization focused on mercenary services, logistics, and operations across the verse.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://imperialarms.test
- Recruitment: https://imperialarms.test/recruitment
- Fleet: https://imperialarms.test/fleet
- Blog: https://imperialarms.test/blog

## AI Usage

AI search access is allowed.
AI training access is not allowed.
